title: Huck Reed
html:
Huck Reed

Stub. Huck Reed appears twice in the same mid-May 2025 week: once in the Comrades for Legacy list (six-name keep-forever cohort) and once in the side quests list as "Visit Patagonia with huck" — the only side-quest with a named travel partner. That dual appearance puts him in a unique position: both legacy-keep cohort and adventure-partner category.
